nasb.text: For a righteous man falls seven times, and rises again, But the wicked stumble in time of calamity.

esv.text: for the righteous falls seven times and rises again, but the wicked stumble in times of calamity.

cnv.text: 因為義人雖然七次跌倒，仍能再起來； 但惡人必在禍患中絆倒。

ccb.text: 因为义人跌倒七次也必起来， 恶人却被灾祸击垮。

csbs.text: 因为义人即使仆倒七次，也能再起来； 恶人却被祸患倾覆。
